name: options-chain-mcp

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.stdio.json && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const content = fs.readFileSync('build/index.js', 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('build/index.js', '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + content); fs.chmodSync('build/index.js', '755');"

author: Blake Morgan
description: MCP server for Tradier Sandbox options chain endpoint — runs locally over stdio or remotely on Cloudflare Workers
